summary: Classified the PR inventory shard from the hydrated preflight artifact. This is not a dedupe cluster and the job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and fix PRs, so open useful PRs are kept non-mutating, already-closed PRs are skipped, and security-sensitive refs are routed only to central security handling.

actions.reason: Useful open PR, but this inventory job can only classify it non-mutating.
Keep open for maintainer/proof follow-up; closure, fix, and merge paths are not available in this job.
Keep open as related follow-up work; technical merge readiness is outside this close/comment/label-only shard.
Maintainer-owned draft/security-adjacent approval-policy work requires maintainer/security judgment; no mutation is safe from this shard.
Active maintainer and author follow-up leaves a technical correctness decision unresolved.
Keep open as a useful related candidate; this job cannot repair or merge it.
Already closed/merged; no closure action is valid.
Already closed/superseded by current main; no close action is valid.
Already closed as superseded; no close action is valid.
Security-sensitive item must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security triage.
Linked security-sensitive issue must be quarantined exactly, without blocking unrelated PR inventory classification.
Linked security-sensitive issue must route to central OpenClaw security handling.

needs_human: #88835 requires maintainer/security judgment because it is a maintainer-owned draft touching exec approval policy handling and is adjacent to quarantined #78225.
#88841 requires maintainer technical judgment because a maintainer said the regression setup was not production-reachable and the author later supplied a detailed follow-up.
